formula: rowset_id = object_id << 16 (for system heap base tables)
note: Confirmed by DBCC IND(typecoverage, 'sys.sysrowsets', -1) showing object_id=5, allocation_unit container_id=327680=5*65536. Also sys.allocation_units in CatalogSS2022 shows container_id values 196608, 327680, 458752, 524288 matching object_ids 3,5,7,8 (sysrscols, sysrowsets, sysallocunits, sysschobjs) shifted left 16 bits. Applies only to system heap base tables; user table partition_ids are assigned differently.
